articles.title: Institutional Investors Sell Off Crypto Holdings Amid Fears of Coming Interest Rate Hikes: CoinShares
articles.description: Digital assets manager CoinShares says institutional investors are feeling cautious about the market as crypto suffers major outflows for the second week in a row. In its latest Digital Asset Fund Flows Weekly Report, CoinShares finds that institutional investors are selling off their crypto holdings amid fears of coming interest rate hikes. “Digital asset investment products saw […]

articles.title: Axelar enables Sommelier DeFi vaults to connect to Arbitrum
articles.description: Axelar partered with Cosmos-based project Sommelier to expand its DeFi vaults to Ethereum Layer 2 network Arbitrum One.

articles.title: Curve Finance’s crvUSD stablecoin deployed on Sepolia testnet ahead of Ethereum mainnet launch
articles.description: Curve Finance deployed the decentralized stablecoin crvUSD on the Sepolia testnet, as a key test ahead of its mainnet launch.
